zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Neville於1442年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓時，她的父親Thomas de Neville37歲，母親Elizabeth Babington48歲。她於1456年11月7日與Sir Gervase Clifton在英國諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1481年8月9日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓享年39歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Neville于1442年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓时，她的父亲Thomas de Neville37岁，母亲Elizabeth Babington48岁。她于1456年11月7日与Sir Gervase Clifton在英国諾廷加姆爾洛勒斯頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1481年8月9日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓享年39岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Neville was born in 1442, in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas de Neville, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth Babington, was 48. She married Sir Gervase Clifton on 7 November 1456, in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 August 1481, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Neville est née en 1442, à Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Neville, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Babington, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gervase Clifton le 7 novembre 1456, à Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1481, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Neville 1442 in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Neville 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Babington 48. Sie hat am 7. November 1456 in Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England Sir Gervase Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. August 1481 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Neville è nata il nel 1442 nel Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Neville, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Babington, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gervase Clifton il 7 novembre 1456, nel Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 agosto 1481, nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Nevilleが1442年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロレストンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Nevilleは37歳，母Elizabeth Babingtonは48歳であった。1456年11月7日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロレストンでSir Gervase Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1481年8月9日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンで39歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Neville(이)가 1442년 영국 노틴그함실르 롤레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Neville(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Babington(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1456년 11월 7일 영국 노틴그함실르 롤레스턴에서 Sir Gervase Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1481년 8월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Neville nasceu em 1442, em Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Neville, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Babington, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gervase Clifton em 7 de novembro de 1456, em Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1481, em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Neville родилась в 1442 г. в местности роллестон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Neville было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Babington, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gervase Clifton 7 ноября 1456 г. в местности роллестон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 августа 1481 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Neville nació en 1442, en Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Neville, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Babington, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Sir Gervase Clifton el 7 de noviembre de 1456, en Rolleston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1481, en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
